titleStmt.title: SII 41.239: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 239. (A.R. No. 458 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Registers a public sale of land freed from taxes by the sabhā of Vaḷaikuḷam alias Nittavinōdachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēlmalai-Vēlūr-nāḍu to a native of Kaḷḷikkuḍi alias Purovarinallūr in Purapparaḷai-nāḍu (a district) of RājarājaPāṇḍināḍu. The purchasear, Kaḷḷikuḍiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Uyavantān alias Rājanārāyaṇa-jōti-vayanāṭṭaraiyaṉ gifted the land to the temple for a lamp service.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara ṉāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat taṉnirupatumalarmaṉnavar cūṭi
ceṅkol vaḷara ticaitoṟum cella veṅkali nīkki meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭal malai ṉaṭātti Irucuṭa(r*)
raḷavum Orucuṭar niḻaṟṟi vīrasimhāsaṉattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya koppara(āja) kesari paṉ
marāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻa devaṟkku yāṇṭu 6 Āṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu melmalai
velūr ṉāṭṭuvaḷaikuḷamāna nittaviṉotac caturppeti maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu Eṅkaḷūr rāja
rājavatikku kiḻakkum mummuṭi coḻa vāykkālukku vaṭakku Orukaṇṇāṟṟu ṉālāñcatirattu teṟkaṭaiyakkuḻi Āyira nikki Itaṉ vaṭakkum kiḻakkum Āka
kkuḻi Āyirattaiññūṟum Eṅkaḷūr kaṭṭaḷaippaṭiye Iṟai Iḻiccitāka koḷvīr Uḷirovenṟu kūṟa Immoḻikeṭṭu Etirmoḻi kuṭuto
ṉ rājarājap pāṇṭiṉāṭṭu puṟappaṟaḷai nāṭṭu kaḷḷikkuṭiyāṉa purovarinallūr kaḷḷikkuṭiyānaraiyan Uyyavantāṉana rājaṉārāyaṇajo
ti vayanāṭṭarayaneṉ Ātiśaṇdheśvara vilaiyāka Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyārkku Oru tirunantā viḷakkukku nīṅkaḷ viṟṟuttarilyāṉume
koḷven Enṟu piṟkūṟa muṟkūṟiyavaḷaikuḷamānanittavinotac catuppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom ṉāṅkaḷ Innilam viṟṟuk kuṭut
tu koḷvatāṉa Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ muṟṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻikaicelakkoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Innilattukku nīrkkīntapa
ṭi nīrpāyap peṟuvatākavum Innilattukku periṟai ciṟṟiṟai maṟṟum Epperp paṭṭaṉavum koḷḷap peṟātomākavum Ittevar koyilile kalli
luñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvatākavum Ippaṭi candrādittavaraicelvatāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom vaḷaikuḷa
māṉa nitta viṉotac catuppeti maṅkalattumahāsabhaiyom paṇiyāṟ karaṇattāṉpuṇḍharikākṣataṉ mātavenen Ivai Enneḻuttukula
kkun=tininṟa nampipaṭṭan Aḻakiya rākavapaṭṭan kirāñcimalaikiniya niṉṟān paṭṭan va The last word is not clear.
Digital edition of SII 41.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
